历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2023, the lowest ranking in the old science college entrance exam was approximately 14696 → 13908 → 13117, showing a year-on-year upward trend; in 2024, Guangxi's first year of the new college entrance exam, the lowest ranking for the Physics Category was approximately 31172 (due to the restructuring of the ranking system caused by the exam mode switch), and in 2025 it quickly rebounded to approximately 19743. After significant fluctuations in the past two years, rankings have stabilized, with the 2025 baseline at approximately 19743. The university's enrollment plan for the Physics Category in Guangxi has been continuously expanding: 36 in 2021–2022 → 43 in 2023 → 47 in 2024 → 52 in 2025 → 65 in 2026, with a 25% increase from 2025 to 2026, a relatively large expansion that alleviates competition. For the History Category, enrollment plans: 2 in 2024 → 3 in 2025 → 4 in 2026, with very small absolute numbers but continuous growth.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 75th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable ranking in the 63–75 range in recent years, placing it at an upper-middle level among 211 universities, with recognized academic strength. The university's reputation has been stable in recent years, with no significant negative public opinion or record of enrollment gaps. Its comprehensive Douyin popularity has not entered the top 100, with average short video exposure and moderate application attention. Geology and Geological Resources and Geological Engineering are traditional A+ disciplines, consistent with the university's mineral resources characteristics. Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity, strongly attracting Physics Category candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: The university is located in Beijing, which has a strong regional appeal to Guangxi candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of approximately 19743, the mitigating effect of a 25% enrollment expansion in 2026, the intensified competition from a 3.3% increase in Guangxi's total number of candidates, and the sustained appeal of the university's 211 level, Beijing location, and high popularity of engineering majors, the expansion's alleviating effect slightly outweighs the pressure from candidate growth. However, the university's comprehensive appeal will prevent a significant backward shift in rankings. It is predicted that the lowest ranking for the Physics Category in 2026 will be approximately 22504, with a range of 22004–23004.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 22004–23004, it is recommended to primarily apply for Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 majors as reach options and Tier 3 majors as safety choices. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 22000) can focus on reaching for popular Tier 1 majors such as Computer Science and Technology and Artificial Intelligence; those with rankings near the upper limit (e.g., around 23000) should prioritize Tier 3 advantageous discipline majors (Geology, Geological Engineering) to ensure admission. Although the university's advantageous disciplines in geology have average social popularity, their academic strength is top-notch, making them suitable for candidates interested in earth sciences.
